title: selaginella undata
intro: Selaginella undata, also known as Spike Moss or Selaginella, is a species of vascular plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including colds, flu, and skin conditions.
